title: FastAPI Developer
responsibilities: design and maintain backend APIs; optimize database queries and service performance; ship reliable services with tests and monitoring
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in python, fastapi, django, postgresql, docker. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: InsightFlow is hiring a junior fastapi developer to support developing backend services, APIs, and data-driven platform features.
raw_text: Vacancy V018: FastAPI Developer at InsightFlow. Location: Odesa. Employment: contract. Required experience: 1.3 years. Required skills: python, fastapi, django, postgresql, docker, pytest, flask, kubernetes. Optional skills: linux, rabbitmq. Responsibilities: design and maintain backend APIs; optimize database queries and service performance; ship reliable services with tests and monitoring.
